name: Kwik Axis Bank Credit Card
exclusions: credit card on UPI transactions less than Rs 2,000
transactions excluded under Kwik Axis Bank Credit Card terms
additionalBenefits: Lifetime free card with nil joining fee and nil annual fee
Credit card on UPI through RuPay with seamless transaction experience through any UPI app
2 EDGE REWARD Points per Rs 200 on domestic and international transactions
1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel purchases between Rs 400 and Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 150 per month
Card can be activated by linking to UPI and setting UPI PIN or through Axis Bank mobile/internet banking

salaried: Eligibility is subject to Axis Bank approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to Axis Bank approval criteria
